title: Department Manager Vacancy at Max Fashion - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Max Fashion - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Max Fashion! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Varanasi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Max Fashion:
Max Fashion is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Max Fashion!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
